caption.full:
Mike Preston, star of Mad Max 2 and Homicide, has died at 93.

The actor, born Jack Davis, passed away on June 8 in Florida. He was known for his role as Detective Bob Delaney in the Australian police drama 'Homicide' and for leading the 1983 sci-fi film 'Metalstorm: The Destruction of Jared-Syn'. Preston also had a successful career as a singer in the United Kingdom.

Share your favorite Mike Preston role below.

youtube.title: Mike Preston Dies at 93; Starred in Mad Max 2
youtube.description:
Mike Preston, known for his roles in 'Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior' and 'Homicide', has died at the age of 93. His wife, Josie Preston, confirmed his passing on June 8 in Florida. He was born Jack Davis and began his career as a chart-topping singer in the U.K.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
